scripts.prebuild: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if(fs.existsSync('dist')) { const rmSync = (dir) => { fs.readdirSync(dir).forEach(file => { const path = require('path').join(dir, file); if(fs.statSync(path).isDirectory()) rmSync(path); else fs.unlinkSync(path); }); fs.rmdirSync(dir); }; rmSync('dist'); }"
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); ['dist', 'node_modules'].forEach(dir => { if(fs.existsSync(dir)) { const rmSync = (p) => { fs.readdirSync(p).forEach(file => { const fp = path.join(p, file); if(fs.statSync(fp).isDirectory()) rmSync(fp); else fs.unlinkSync(fp); }); fs.rmdirSync(p); }; rmSync(dir); } }); if(fs.existsSync('package-lock.json')) fs.unlinkSync('package-lock.json');"
scripts.clean:dist: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if(fs.existsSync('dist')) { const rmSync = (dir) => { fs.readdirSync(dir).forEach(file => { const p = require('path').join(dir, file); if(fs.statSync(p).isDirectory()) rmSync(p); else fs.unlinkSync(p); }); fs.rmdirSync(dir); }; rmSync('dist'); }"
